data.body: MILESTONE: bug#5 (1d63 autodeploy) MERGED (Gerrit 510) + ticket closed. In review after FFO-rebase onto ffcf2c662: 508 bug#4, 509 bug#1, 512 bug#2, 513 bug#3. Bug#7 (b3e5 --force+idempotence) delegated to subagent (short-circuit keyed on material_fingerprint + attest validity, pre-LLM in _run_plan_review; --force on CLI+MCP). LANDING GOTCHA: completion-verifier reads the MAIN CHECKOUT which lags GitHub-origin replication — ff the checkout from the GERRIT remote (git fetch gerrit main; merge --ff-only FETCH_HEAD) before closing a ticket so the verifier sees merged code. FFO forces rebase+re-CI of all pending on each merge (Gerrit REST /rebase). REMAINING: #6 d220 Dockerfile entrypoint (heavy harness), #8 406f grounding (heavy eval harness), #9 7a41 runbook+workdir doc, #10 9d7c runbook+hung-worker timeout.
